query: Tokyo Metropolitan Government population 2024 Tokyo population 14 million
answer: As of 2024, Tokyo Prefecture has a population of approximately 14 million. The Tokyo metropolitan area, however, is much larger, with an estimated 37.4 million inhabitants. The most recent data confirms these figures.
